LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF G.K.K. 351 L.L.C.'S MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER. THE MATTER IS ARGUED. COURT DECLARES THE MATTER IN RECESS AND REQUESTS THE PARTIES MEET AND CONFER DURING THE RECESS. AFTER A MEET AND CONFER BETWEEN COUNSEL, THE PARTIES INDICATE THAT THEY HAVE REACHED AN AGREEMENT. COURT SIGNS AN "ORDER APPOINTING RECEIVER AFTER HEARING AND PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION - RENTS, ISSUES AND PROFITS". JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, ARGUED AND THE COURT DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR AN ORDER SHORTENING TIME FOR HEARING AND ISSUING ORDER REQUIRING RECONVEYANCE OF DEED OF TRUST. AN ORDER SHORTENING TIME WAS GRANTED FOR A MOTION SETTING AMOUNT OF DEFAULT AND REMOVING RECEIVER. THAT MOTION IS TO BE NOTICED FOR OCTOBER 11, 2007 TO BE HEARD WITH THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, AND THE MOTION TO EXPAND POWERS OF THE COURT APPOINTED RECEIVER. OPPOSITION WILL REMAIN DUE ON OCTOBER 4, 2007, AND IS TO BE SERVED BY HAND DELIVERY OR FAX. REPLY WILL BE DUE ON OCTOBER 9, 2007. THE COURT ADVISED THE PARTIES THAT THERE WILL NOT BE AN EVIDENTIARY HEARING REGARDING THIS MATTER. MR. HENDRICKS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, ARGUED AND THE COURT CONTINUED THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: CONTEMPT FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH TWO COURT ORDERS TO OCTOBER 11, 2007. THE PARTIES MAY FILE SIMULTANEOUS BREIFS WHICH MUST BE FILED AND SERVED BY HAND DELIVERY BY 9:00 AM ON OCTOBER 9, 2007. ANY REPLY TO THE BRIEFS MUST BE FILED BY NOON ON OCTOBER 10, 2007. THE MOTION TO EXPAND THE POWERS OF THE COURT APPOINTED RECEIVER WILL BE ADVANCED FROM OCTOBER 18, 2007 TO OCTOBER 11, 2007 TO BE HEARD WITH THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE. MR. HENDRICKS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BRUGNARA PROPERTIES APPLICATION FOR ORDER REMOVING RECEIVER UPON PAYMENT AND SETTING AMOUNT OF ATTORNEY FEES TO BE DEPOSITED. ARGUED AND THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: IF DEFENDANT BRUGNARA PROPERTIES DEPOSITS $2,671,463.40 PLUS INTEREST AT THE DAILY RATE OF $4,162.06, STARTING NOVEMBER 7, 2007 TO THE DATE OF DEPOSIT, THE COURT WILL NOT SEE THE NEED TO EITHER SUPPLEMENT THE POWERS OF THE RECEIVER OR TO CONTINUE TO HAVE THE RECEIVER IN PLACE. THE COURT RESCHEDULED THE HEARING TO DETERMINE WHETHER AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SHOULD BE ISSUED TO DEFENDANT TO NOVEMBER 9, 2007 AT 3:00 PM INSTEAD OF 1:30 PM AS PREVIOUSLY SET. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Off Calendar Dec-26-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF G.K.K. 351, L.L.C.'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR VIOLATIONS OF COURT ORDERS.
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. GIVEN THE COURT'S RULING DECLINING TO PREVENT THE FORCLOSURE, PLAINTIFF IS MORE THAN LIKELY TO OWN THE BUILDING IN JANUARY. PLAINTIFF CAN SEEK FURTHER RELIEF IF THE EVIDENCE SUPPORTS THE FAILURE OF DEFENDANT TO TURN OVER RENTS RECEIVED. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

APPEARANCES: GREGORY P. DRESSER, ESQUIRE (MORRISON & FOERSTER, 415.268.6396) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. ROBERT F. KANE, ESQUIRE (415.982.1510) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.

Hearing To Determine Whether Order To Show Should Be Issued To Defendant
Off Calendar Nov-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF GKK 351 LLC'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO DETERMINE WHETHER DEFENDANT BRUGNARA PROPERTIES, I, L.P. SHOULD BE HELD IN CONTEMPT FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S AUGUST 23, 2007 TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER AND SEPTEMBER 12, 2007 ORDER APPOINTING RECEIVER.
APPEARANCES: Gregory P. Dresser, Esq. of Morrison & Foerster LLP 268-6396 for plaintiff & moving party; Robert F. Kane of Law Offices of Robert F. Kane 982-1510 for defendant & opposing party.
RULING: Hearing held. The Court marked for identification and received into evidence the following plaintiff's exhibits:
Exhibit 1 - Order shortening time for hearing and issuing temporary restraining order (filed on 08/23/07);
Exhibit 2 - Order appointing receiver after hearing and preliminary injunction - rents, issues, and profits (filed on 09/12/07);
Exhibit 3 - Declaration of Thomas Hebrank (filed on 10/09/07).
Argued and the Court finds that the defendant entity is in contempt of Court and fined $1,000.00. In addition, the defendant corporation is to provide to the receiver books and records of the operations of the entity as it relates to this particular property. At the conclusion of the hearing, plaintiff's exhibits 1, 2, and 3 were returned to counsel in open Court. Order pertaining to the 11/07/07 hearing re removing receiver signed in open court. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Defendant Brugnara Properties Application For Order Removing Receiver Upon Payment And Setting Amount Of Attorney Fees To Be Deposited
Off Calendar Nov-07-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gregory P. Dresser of Morrison Foerster, 268.6396, appearing for plaintiff and responding party
Robert F. Kane of the Law Offices of Robert F. Kane, 982.1510, appearing for defendant and moving party

Argued and the Court ruled as follows: If defendant Brugnara Properties deposits $2,671,463.40 plus interest at the daily rate of $4,162.06, starting November 7, 2007 to the date of deposit, the Court will not see the need to either supplement the powers of the receiver or to continue to have the receiver in place. The Court rescheduled the hearing to determine whether an Order to Show Cause should be issued to defendant to November 9, 2007 at 3:00 pm instead of 1:30 pm as previously set. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Motion To Expand Powers Of Court Appointed Receiver
Off Calendar Oct-03-2007 Advanced From Oct-18-07 To Oct-11-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Motion For Setting Amount Of Default And Removing Receiver
Off Calendar Oct-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT BRUGNARA PROPERTIES I, L.P.'S Motion For Setting Amount Of Default And Removing Receiver.
APPEARANCES: Gregory P. Dresser, Esq. 415/268-6396 & Melissa A. Jones, Esq. 916/325-1326 of Morrison Foerster LLP for pltf & opposing party; Robert F. Kane, Esq. of Law Offices of Robert F. Kane 982-1510 for deft/x-complainant & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court denied the motion. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Motion To Expand Powers Of Court Appointed Receiver
Off Calendar Oct-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF GKK 351 LLC'S Motion To Expand Powers Of Court-Appointed Receiver.
APPEARANCES: Gregory P. Dresser, Esq. 415/268-6396 & Melissa A. Jones, Esq. 916/325-1326 of Morrison Foerster LLP for pltf & moving party; Robert F. Kane, Esq. of Law Offices of Robert F. Kane 982-1510 for deft & opposing party.
RULING: Argued and the Court granted the motion effective 11/13/07 unless parties are able to resolve matter or defendant Brugnara Properties place in escrow the amounts (disputed and undisputed) that are agreed to by both parties. (Discussion re plaintiff's request to modify receivership order that funds in excess of operating expenses held by receiver be paid toward the debt owed, since no opposition.) (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Hearing To Determine Whether Order To Show Should Be Issued To Defendant
Off Calendar Oct-11-2007 Continued To Nov-09-07 At 03:00 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Hearing To Determine Whether Order To Show Cause Should Be Issued To Defendant.
APPEARANCES: Gregory P. Dresser, Esq. 415/268-6396 & Melissa A. Jones, Esq. 916/325-1326 of Morrison Foerster LLP for pltf; Robert F. Kane, Esq. of Law Offices of Robert F. Kane 982-1510 for deft.
RULING: The Court sets an order to show re contempt hearing for 11/09/07 at 1:30pm to determine whether defendant Brugnara Properties I, L.P. should be held in contempt for failure to comply with the Court's 08/23/07 and 09/12/07 orders. Order signed in open court. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Hearing To Determine Whether Order To Show Should Be Issued To Defendant
Off Calendar Oct-03-2007 Continued To Oct-11-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert F. Kane of Law Offices of Robert F. Kane, 982-1510, appearing for defendant Brugnara Properties
Douglas Hendricks and Melissa Jones of Morrison Foerster, 268-7037, appearing for plaintiff GKK 351, LLC

Argued and the Court continued the Order To Show Cause re: Contempt for failure to comply with two Court orders to October 11, 2007. The parties may file simultaneous breifs which must be filed and served by hand delivery by 9:00 am on October 9, 2007. Any reply to the briefs must be filed by noon on October 10, 2007. The Motion to expand the powers of the Court appointed receiver will be advanced from October 18, 2007 to October 11, 2007 to be heard with the Order to Show Cause. Mr. Hendricks to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

For An Order Shortening Time
Off Calendar Oct-03-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert F. Kane of Law Offices of Robert F. Kane, 982-1510, appearing for defendant and moving party Brugnara Properties
Douglas Hendricks and Melissa Jones of Morrison Foerster, 268-7037, appearing for plaintiff and responding partyGKK 351, LLC

Argued and the Court denied without prejudice defendant's request for an Order Shortening Time FOR HEARING AND ISSUING ORDER REQUIRING RECONVEYANCE OF DEED OF TRUST. An order shortening time was granted for a motion setting amount of default and removing receiver. That motion is to be noticed for October 11, 2007 to be heard with the Order to show cause, and the motion to expand powers of the Court appointed receiver. Opposition will remain due on October 4, 2007, and is to be served by hand delivery or fax. Reply will be due on October 9, 2007. The Court advised the parties that there will not be an evidentiary hearing regarding this matter. Mr. Hendricks to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Mtn For Appointment Of Receiver
Off Calendar Sep-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF G.K.K. 351 L.L.C.'S MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER.
APPEARANCES: ROBERT KANE, ESQUIRE (415.982.1510) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. GREGORY P. DRESSER, ESQUIRE AND MELISSA A. JONES, ESQUIRE (MORRISON & FOERSTER, 415.268.6396 [DRESSER]) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS.
RULING: THE MATTER IS ARGUED. COURT DECLARES THE MATTER IN RECESS AND REQUESTS THE PARTIES MEET AND CONFER DURING THE RECESS. AFTER A MEET AND CONFER BETWEEN COUNSEL, THE PARTIES INDICATE THAT THEY HAVE REACHED AN AGREEMENT. COURT SIGNS AN "ORDER APPOINTING RECEIVER AFTER HEARING AND PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION - RENTS, ISSUES AND PROFITS". (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
